I think the cool thing about our approach is because it is reflection
oriented and not interview oriented. It lends itself to a, it lends
itself to one sort of being agnostic of the job, which I think gives you
a more like a more honest caliber of reflection versus trying to
constantly pivot yourself for a job. And I think it also is just. Lying
is a sprint, right? It\'s a sprint sport, it\'s not a marathon.
